element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic movement and punch mechanics introduced immediately
Simple AI patterns, player learns timing and spacing
Vertical navigation introduced as core movement skill
Pattern recognition and sustained engagement required
Reaching the top of each structure to advance

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating all enemies on current screen
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Arcade-style wave-based tension with escalating enemy density per stage; brief relief moments between encounters; sustained engagement through vertical progression structure

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction with manageable single-enemy encounters; player learns spacing and timing on accessible platforms
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Enemy count increases; stage complexity escalates with tighter platform layouts and more aggressive positioning
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dense enemy waves; boss patterns demand precise pattern recognition; reduced margin for error on navigation hazards
notable_spikes: First boss encounter introduces sustained combat demand
Mid-stage transitions with multiple enemies coordinating attacks
Final stages combine platforming precision with aggressive enemy AI

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage is fundamentally a climb from bottom to top through multiple connected platforms. Player progression is explicitly spatial—reaching the top of the structure completes the stage. Enemies are distributed at various heights, forcing player to navigate through combat encounters while ascending.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All stages follow this core pattern

notable_level_patterns.description: Enemies appear in manageable groups on screen sections. Clearing all enemies on current platform allows safe advancement or retreat. New enemies spawn as player progresses upward, creating rhythm of engagement-relief-engagement.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Foundational to stage design across game

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage culminates in a boss encounter at the structure's peak. Boss patterns repeat, allowing player to learn and exploit timing windows. Victory advances to next stage.
